rules.name: async_route_handlers
rules.description: FastAPI route handlers should be async for I/O-bound operations
rules.message: Synchronous route handler detected. Use 'async def' for I/O-bound FastAPI routes.
rules.fix_suggestion: Change 'def' to 'async def' for this route handler.

rules.name: route_path_lowercase
rules.description: FastAPI route paths should be lowercase with hyphens
rules.message: Route path contains uppercase characters. Use lowercase with hyphens (e.g., /get-user-info).
rules.fix_suggestion: Rename the route path to lowercase-with-hyphens convention.

rules.name: route_docstring_required
rules.description: FastAPI routes should have a docstring for auto-generated OpenAPI docs
rules.message: Route handler missing docstring. Add a docstring for OpenAPI documentation.
rules.fix_suggestion: Add a docstring: """Brief description of what this endpoint does."""
rules.comment: Disabled by default — too many false positives on helper async functions.

rules.name: use_pydantic_models
rules.description: Request/response bodies should use Pydantic models, not plain dicts
rules.message: Route parameter typed as dict. Use a Pydantic BaseModel for request bodies.
rules.fix_suggestion: Create a Pydantic model: class CreateUserRequest(BaseModel): ...

rules.name: explicit_cors_configuration
rules.description: CORS should be configured explicitly — avoid allow_origins=['*'] in production
rules.message: CORSMiddleware configured with allow_origins=['*']. Set explicit trusted origins in production.
rules.fix_suggestion: Replace '*' with a list of allowed origins: ['https://yourdomain.com'].

rules.name: http_exception_usage
rules.description: Use HTTPException for error responses — not plain raise or sys.exit
rules.message: Non-HTTP exception raised inside a route. Use HTTPException with a proper status code.
rules.fix_suggestion: Raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail='message') for API error responses.

rules.name: feature_based_routers
rules.description: Use APIRouter per feature module — avoid all routes in main.py
rules.message: Route defined directly on 'app' in main.py. Consider using APIRouter for feature-based organisation.
rules.fix_suggestion: Move this route to a feature module with its own APIRouter and include_router().
